channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fogo de Chão Introduces Bar Fogo on Ground Floor
item.description: Fogo de Chão, the renowned Brazilian steakhouse chain, has expanded its offerings by launching Bar Fogo at its Glorietta 4 location. This new establishment, situated on the ground floor of the main re...

item.title: Selena Vargas's Journey: From Adult Film Fame to Private Life
item.description: Selena Vargas, a former adult film actress, became an internet sensation after a viral photo of her and her boyfriend surfaced on 4chan. The image, initially claimed to be a Navy SEAL and his girlfrie...

item.title: Tanzania's President Mwinyi Pushes for Business-Friendly Reforms to Boost Economy
item.description: Zanzibar President Dr Hussein Mwinyi has called for urgent reforms to cut bureaucratic delays and create a more supportive environment for businesses in Tanzania. Speaking at the conclusion of the 50t...

item.title: Legal uncertainty looms for artists' freedom of expression in Australia
item.description: The Federal Court's recent ruling on the Melbourne Symphony Orchestra (MSO) canceling pianist Jayson Gillham's performance has sparked debate about artistic freedom and workplace laws. Gillham claimed...

item.title: Kenya Weather Outlook: 16 Counties Expected to Get Rain in Next Week
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a seven-day weather forecast warning of dry conditions across most regions. However, 16 counties including Bungoma, Kakamega, and Kisumu are predicted to...

item.title: Jon Rahm Reflects on Performance and Competition in Golf
item.description: Jon Rahm, a two-time major winner, has expressed confidence in his ability to secure a third major title ahead of The Open. Despite facing criticism for his achievements in the LIV Golf Tour, Rahm ins...

item.title: Murder suspect Ndodana Tshuma's case postponed for immigration status review
item.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, accused of murdering his wife and two daughters in the UK, appeared briefly in a Johannesburg court. His case was postponed to July 22 to verify his immigration status in Sou...

item.title: Twiga Stars prepare for Wafcon finals with Nigeria friendly
item.description: Tanzania’s women’s national football team, Twiga Stars, is preparing for the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (Wafcon) with a crucial friendly match against Nigeria. The game, scheduled for July 19 ...

item.title: Rangers personnel martyred in JAAC attack at Rawalakot bus terminal
item.description: A banned militant group, the Jammu Kashmir Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC), launched an attack on security forces at the Matial Maira bus terminal in Rawalakot, resulting in the martyrdom of one R...

item.title: Oyo School Principal Details Harsh Treatment of Abducted Students and Teachers
item.description: The principal of Community High School in Oyo State, Rachael Alamu, has shared harrowing details of the 56-day ordeal her schoolchildren and teachers endured after being kidnapped. During captivity, t...

item.title: Legal Scandal Threatens Trump's Political Standing
item.description: The article discusses a legal or political scandal involving former President Donald Trump, where the case has enough weight to impact his position. It highlights how this particular scandal differs f...

item.title: Impeachment court warns defense and prosecution to avoid side remarks during Sara Duterte trial
item.description: The Senate impeachment court presiding officer, Francis 'Chiz' Escudero, warned the defense and prosecution teams of Vice President Sara Duterte to refrain from making side remarks during the ongoing ...

item.title: Heineken's Bar De Change Simplifies Beer Costs for Nigerian Travelers
item.description: Heineken is introducing Bar De Change in Nigeria, a service that lets travelers buy Heineken at local prices before flying to the US or Mexico and redeem it at partner bars abroad. This initiative aim...

item.title: Political Prisoner Group Challenges 'Ghost Witness' in Illegal Possession Case
item.description: Political prisoner support group Kapatid denounced the prosecution's reliance on a 'ghost witness' in the illegal possession of firearms and explosives case against Vicente Ladlad, Alberto Villamor, a...

item.title: Rajinikanth's New Project 'Jailer 2' Audio Launch Speculated in Malaysia
item.description: The recent photograph of Rajinikanth has sparked widespread speculation about the upcoming audio launch of his film 'Jailer 2', which is rumored to be set for a special event in Malaysia. This develop...

item.title: European unity showcased at Bastille Day celebrations amid Ukraine support and climate disruptions
item.description: This year's Bastille Day commemorations in Paris highlighted European solidarity and support for Ukraine, with a grand military parade featuring troops and aircraft from across the continent. Presiden...

item.title: B.C. Pilot Dies in Helicopter Crash During Colorado Wildfire Fight
item.description: A 56-year-old British Columbia pilot, Nicholas Dale, died after his helicopter crashed while battling the Gold Mountain Fire in Colorado. The incident occurred on Sunday near Silver Jack Reservoir, so...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Delays Testimony After Advocate Andrea Johnson's Absence
